---
title: "🧮 Fundamentals"
listing:
  contents: notes/fundamentals
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, depth, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    depth: "Depth"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Tensors, classical ML, training, architectures, and vision - the building blocks everything else in this site stands on.
